name: deployPublish
_note: app-maker.deployPublish is a LENS_ACTIONS handler (server/domains/appmaker.js:882), reached only via /api/lens/run on the HYPHENATED key 'app-maker.deployPublish'. It is per-user + STATE-backed: it resolves the caller's own project (findProject(s, actor.userId, projectId)) and a missing/unknown/not-owned projectId returns ok:false error:'project_not_found' — never another user's project, never a throw. On success it snapshots a version and flips deployment.status to 'live' with a deterministic-shape hosted URL (slug-buildId.apps.concord-os.org). The fuzz cases assume an empty STATE (the assassin's default), so every projectId is unknown → project_not_found; a happy-path ok:true requires a pre-created project for this actor, which the behavioral test (server/tests/appmaker-lens-macros.test.js) exercises with a real round-trip. LENS_ACTIONS-only → not driven by the MACROS-based macro-assassin.
